episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Being Jewish gets mistaken for autism, and the two identities share so much the only real difference is the Holocaust.
"They" calling him autistic implies widespread consensus, but reveals it's only his dad.

2.premise: A Jewish list can mean Epstein's list or Schindler's List.

3.premise: Autism is like Judaism because both share identical behavioral traits, differing only in their historical relationship with trains.

lines.text: -Ever since getting on this show,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I have never been called autistic more in my entire life.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And when I say autistic, they're saying retarded a lot.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And when I say they, I mean my dad.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: This guy -- He won't stop saying it!
lines.label: tag

lines.text: [ Laughs ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And I'm just Jewish, man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm just Jewish, man. I'm just fucking...
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I mean, I'm so Jewish.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I have family on both Epstein and Schindler's list, dude.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know, I realize there's a lot of similarities
lines.label: setup

lines.text: between autism and Judaism, dude.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There are, like...
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There are, man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, I mean, we're both loud.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We're prone to nervousness.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We're very socially-- shut the fuck up, dude.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No, we're very anxious people.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We can be obsessive.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I realize the number one difference
lines.label: setup

lines.text: between autism and Judaism is that Jews don't like trains.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you guys so much.
lines.label: fluff
